General.Name: Dadi Education Holdings Ltd
General.Description: Dadi Education Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, provides professional overseas studies consultancy services. It serves students seeking secondary and higher education studies in the United Kingdom, Australia, Canada, New Zealand, the United States, Hong Kong, and internationally. The company was founded in 1990 and is headquartered in Mong Kok, Hong Kong. Dadi Education Holdings Limited operates as a subsidiary of Grand Courage Investments Limited.
General.Address: 700 Nathan Road, Mong Kok, Hong Kong

1.Name: Mr. Regan  Chung
1.Title: Chief Executive Officer, Compliance Officer & Executive Director
